Experience

Internships, roles, and projects.

Sales & Marketing Associate

Legal Tech Meet

April 2026 - Present

Kolkata, West Bengal

On-site

At Legal Tech Meet, I execute targeted outreach across LinkedIn, cold email, and direct calls to onboard relevant professionals for IP- and AI-focused industry events. I identify and segment audiences across legal, technology, and policy sectors, focusing on decision-makers and domain specialists to improve outreach precision. My role involves building and refining participant acquisition efforts to prioritize quality over volume, ensuring stronger alignment between attendees and event themes. I also contribute to campaign execution and messaging to drive engagement and encourage repeat participation.

General Management Intern

ADORE

April 2025 - June 2025

Kolkata, West Bengal

On-site

At ADORE, I supported the creation of an early-stage food startup by working across vendor sourcing, supply chain setup, and on-ground operations. I negotiated with street vendors to establish initial procurement and distribution channels, and assisted in product development and go-to-market planning during the launch phase. I also built the company's website to support early visibility and customer acquisition. In parallel, I conducted cold outreach to NGOs to promote free online tutoring services and taught students from underserved backgrounds through these partnerships.
